title: CIA’s Psychic Research - Project Stargate
summary: This interview discusses the CIA's Project Stargate, a psychic spy program that operated from 1972 to 1995. The conversation covers remote viewing capabilities and their historical use for intelligence gathering, including finding Russian nuclear bases and American hostages.

acronyms.definition: U.S. government intelligence agency that ran the psychic research program

events.description: Project Stargate psychic spy program began

key_claims.claim: The CIA ran a psychic spy program called Stargate from 1972 to 1995 to find Russian nuclear bases and American hostages
Remote viewing functioning is a survival mechanism, historically used by shamans to keep small tribes alive
Stargate program's psychic intelligence was confirmed by traditional intelligence methodologies in many cases
